title: Non-record: Mixture of Depth (MoD) Per-Layer Token Routing
author: genji0306

data.description: Per-layer binary token router lets easy tokens skip transformer layers while hard tokens execute full layer computation.

novel_contributions: Per-layer binary routing for Mixture of Depth (MoD)
Token-level skipping of transformer layers to reduce average step time
Zero-parameter-addition exported artifact compared with MoE-style approaches
Auxiliary load-balancing loss to encourage meaningful easy/hard token routing
